headline: Nucor Safety Record And New Capacity Shape Outlook For 2026
summary: Nucor (NYSE:NUE) reports its lowest ever injury and illness rate, setting a new safety record. Multiple large growth projects completed in 2025, including new production facilities across several states, are moving into full operation this year. The company expects higher steel mill shipments and an improved earnings outlook for 2026. Nucor, one of the largest steel producers in the United States, sits at the intersection of construction, manufacturing, and energy demand. The fresh safety...

headline: Countdown to Nucor (NUE) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Nucor (NUE), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Insulated Metal Panels Market by Metal Type, Insulation Material, Application, End-use, and Region - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The insulated metal panels market is expected to reach USD 15.01 billion by 2025 and USD 17.13 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 2.69%. This expansion is driven by rising urbanization and the demand for efficient construction technologies. Stringent energy-saving regulations further boost market growth. The steel segment will capture the largest share in 2030 due to its durability and cost-effectiveness, while the mineral wool segment will exhibit the highest CAGR for its fire resistance and
